function.name: task_done
function.description: Mark a task as done. Records the result (summary) and optional artifacts (JSON string of file paths / PR refs). Sets status='done'. Must be called by the agent that claimed the task, or by the coordinator.

task_id.description: The id of the task to mark done

result.description: Final summary of what was accomplished (1-5 paragraphs)

artifacts.description: JSON string of artifacts: list of file paths, commit refs, PR numbers, etc.
